components.role: Public validation and onboarding surface only.
External private runtime boundary; not bundled or cloned by this repo.
Conceptual managed automation edge; no execution from launcher.
Conceptual managed evidence boundary outside this repo.

requiredLocalCapabilities: Git checkout of this public source-available launcher.
Human review of readiness before any future managed activation.
excludedCapabilities: No private runtime source is included.
No customer credentials are collected or stored in this repo.
No provider calls, webhook server, database provisioning or cloud deployment are performed.
No binary installer or Docker service start is provided.
operatorNextSteps: Run the A07 validator from the public launcher.
Review managed handoff boundaries with Dani before live activation.
Keep customer credentials and provider setup outside this public repo.
Use a later approved managed path for any real activation.
publicSafeSummary: Managed mode validates the future TransformIA Cloud handoff shape only. It does not deploy, start services, include the private core or collect credentials. Human approval is required before live activation.
